name: UNC4899
description: UNC4899 is a North Korea-linked threat actor focused on large-scale cryptocurrency theft, blockchain infrastructure compromise, and financial operations supporting DPRK sanctions evasion and regime funding. Often tracked under names such as TraderTraitor and Jade Sleet, the group targets cryptocu...
strategic_objectives: Direct theft of cryptocurrency and digital assets
Funding DPRK state operations through sanctions evasion
Compromise of blockchain infrastructure and wallet systems
